channel.title: Widget Watch — Delta Air Lines Flight Tracker
channel.description: Real-time Delta Air Lines operations dashboard. Live flight tracking, hub delay monitoring, Starlink WiFi fleet status, and operational analytics for all 9 Delta hubs.

item.title: Delta Air Lines Live Flight Dashboard
item.description: Track every Delta Air Lines flight in real time. 600+ flights on a live map updated every 30 seconds. Hub delay alerts, IRROPS monitoring, flight search, and weather radar.

item.title: Delta Air Lines Fleet Database — 1,078 Aircraft
item.description: Complete Delta Air Lines fleet database. Search 1,078 mainline aircraft by type, registration, seat configuration, WiFi, and Starlink status. Boeing 737, 757, 767, 777, 787, Airbus A319, A320, A321neo.

item.title: Delta Air Lines Hub Airports — All 9 Hubs
item.description: Live status at all 9 Delta Air Lines hub airports. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance at ORD, DEN, IAH, EWR, SFO, IAD, LAX, NRT, and GUM.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Chicago O'Hare (ORD) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Chicago O'Hare. Real-time delays, cancellations, on-time performance, Starlink WiFi, and schedules. Delta's largest hub with ~750 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Denver (DEN) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Denver International. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance, Starlink WiFi. Delta's second-largest hub with ~540 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Houston (IAH) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Houston Intercontinental. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance. Delta's Latin America gateway with ~400 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Newark (EWR) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Newark Liberty. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance. Delta's East Coast transatlantic gateway with ~400 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at San Francisco (SFO) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at San Francisco International. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance. Delta's Asia-Pacific gateway with ~300 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Washington Dulles (IAD) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Washington Dulles. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance. ~250 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Los Angeles (LAX) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Los Angeles International. Delays, cancellations, on-time performance. Delta's Pacific gateway with ~200 daily departures.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Tokyo Narita (NRT) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Tokyo Narita International. Delta's Asian hub connecting Pacific routes.

item.title: Delta Air Lines at Guam (GUM) — Hub Status
item.description: Live Delta Air Lines status at Guam International. Delta's Pacific island hub.
